problem id: fcc5f83d
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) AND SHL(1)

examples:
  10001000 -> 00010000
  10011011 -> 00110010
  00110101 -> 00100010
  10100000 -> 00000000
  00011100 -> 00000000
  10111011 -> 01110110
  11000110 -> 10001000
  01010001 -> 00100010
  11110100 -> 10001000

query: 01100001
predicted answer: 00000000
